description_long: This object is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a dog, with a rounded head, floppy ears, and a short tail. Its fur is predominantly white with some darker patches, particularly visible on the back and tail. The face features small, dark eyes and a brown nose, giving it a gentle and friendly appearance. The body is soft and slightly flattened, with the limbs tucked close to the sides. The surface texture appears fuzzy and plush, typical of soft toys designed for children. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy.
description: A soft, plush dog stuffed toy with white fur, floppy ears, and a brown nose. It has a gentle, friendly face and a fuzzy texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded head, floppy ears, and brown nose with both eyes visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tucked limbs and the transition from white to darker fur on the back and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the short tail and the darker patch covering much of the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other set of limbs and the plush, rounded body.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with small, dark eyes and a simple brown nose. There is no visible mouth or pronounced emotion.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Lying down with all four limbs tucked close to the body and the head resting forward.
